description_long: This is a Nintendo Game Boy Color, a classic handheld gaming console with a distinctive green plastic casing. The front features a rectangular LCD screen, a D-pad, two main action buttons (A and B), and smaller 'Select' and 'Start' buttons, along with a speaker grille. The back reveals a battery compartment and a cartridge slot, with visible branding and regulatory information. The sides show a power switch, volume control, and link cable port, all integrated into the compact, ergonomic design. The device is primarily constructed from molded plastic with some metal and electronic components inside. Its compact size and rounded edges make it easily portable and comfortable to hold for extended periods.
description: A green Nintendo Game Boy Color handheld console with a screen, control buttons, and cartridge slot, designed for portable gaming. The device features a plastic body, visible branding, and ergonomic controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, D-pad, A and B buttons, 'Select' and 'Start' buttons, and speaker grille.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the power switch, volume control, and the slim profile of the device.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, cartridge slot, and branding labels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the link cable port and additional side details.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, D-pad, power switch, volume dial
